_comment: SSOT for pre-uploaded pet/egg inventory-card THUMBNAILS (flat IMAGE asset ids). Consumed by scripts/gen_pet_thumbnails.js -> configs/pet_thumbnail_assets.lua, which the inventory card (InventoryPanel) renders as a flat ImageLabel when present (else the baked ViewportFrame). Keys are the CONFIG petType + variant (configs/pets.lua is authoritative); render filenames map basic->basic and gold->golden (rainbow has no render — it's an inventory background + an in-game outline-recolor script, so it stays on the basic texture/viewport). IMPORTANT: ids MUST be uploaded GROUP-owned (15872767) via Open Cloud — the Studio MCP upload_image uploads to the logged-in USER and greys out for everyone else. Keys starting with _ are ignored by the generator. Pet keys: pets.<petType>.<variant> and pets.<petType>.<variant>__huge. Egg keys: eggs.<eggType>.
